name: Patsy's
teaser: The best pizza value in the country. A true old school coal oven slice that feels timeless.
review: The very best pizza value in the country. $2.25 (last I checked) for a true old school coal oven slice that feels timeless. Yeah, you have to add in the cost of getting up to Harlem, but that's your problem, not theirs.
headsUp: Best pizza value in the country. The trip to Harlem is worth it.
update: Prices have crept up slightly but still the best deal in town.
hours: Monday: 11:30 AM – 9:45 PM · Tuesday: 11:30 AM – 9:45 PM · Wednesday: 11:30 AM – 9:45 PM · Thursday: 11:30 AM – 9:45 PM · Friday: 11:30 AM – 10:45 PM · Saturday: 11:30 AM – 10:45 PM · Sunday: 11:30 AM – 9:45 PM
